brand-story-img-1.query: Our Story Designed in our atelier. Worn for a lifetime. Velmora began as a small bench in a shared studio — a search for the warmth of fine gold at a price you can wear every day. Each piece is sketched, cast, and finished by hand in small batches, with the same patience a jeweler brings to an heirloom.
